pages.title: 1st of the Month (Walk It Out)
pages.tagline: Start fresh with East Coast grit and Latin soul.

pages.body: Step into a motivational anthem where self-improvement meets triumphant resilience. This driving boom-bap track blends rapid-fire melodic harmonies with deep, warm bass lines to forge a path of disciplined renewal. Leave past failures behind as the crew chants their way toward ultimate victory. From anxious awakenings in the streets of Queens and Brooklyn to commanding motions that rebuild lives brick by brick, this journey transforms void into gold. It is not just music; it is a declaration that discipline over sympathy shapes destiny.
pages.styleSentence: A driving East Coast boom-bap track at 95 BPM featuring rapid-fire melodic harmonies, layered crew chants, and soulful piano stabs over a deep warm bass line with subtle Latin percussion accents.

pages.text:
[Intro - Crowd]
Ayo...
New month.
New page.
Same mission.

[Group Chant]
First of the month!
First of the month!
First of the month!

[Hook - Full Crew]
It's the first of the month,
Walk it out, walk it out,
All that talk from last month,
Gotta walk it out, walk it out.

It's the first of the month,
Sun up, we ain't slowing down,
Got the whole summer looking different now.

Walk it out.
Walk it out.
Walk it out.
Walk it out.

[Verse 1 - Rapper 1]
East Elmhurst kid from the one-oh-three,
Back when the dream looked bigger than me.
One-two-seven, school bell ring,
Trying to figure out what this life gon' bring.

Queens on my back,
Brooklyn in my stride,
Never switched up,
Still the same inside.

Boricua blood,
Dominican soul,
Veneno y miel,
Turn the void into gold.

Everybody got a plan till the work show up,
Everybody got bars till the hurt show up.
Word is bond,
What you say gotta stay,
If you build it brick by brick,
You can change your fate.

[Hook - Full Crew]
It's the first of the month,
Walk it out, walk it out,
All that talk from last month,
Gotta walk it out, walk it out.

It's the first of the month,
Sun up, we ain't slowing down,
Got the whole summer looking different now.

Walk it out.
Walk it out.
Walk it out.
Walk it out.

[Verse 2 - Rapper 2]
Okinawa nights,
Marine Corps days,
Semper Fi mindset,
Still living that way.

Discipline first,
Then the blessings arrive,
Loyal to the mission,
Loyal to the tribe.

Community college,
Then John Jay halls,
Every little step made the next one tall.

Nursing home systems,
Late night calls,
Now I walk through a law firm solving it all.

Level Ready,
Yeah I'm standing on ten,
If I gotta start over,
I'll build it again.

Ex-One-See-Seven,
That's the code on the wall,
If the dream too small,
Then it ain't one at all.

[Bridge - Group Harmony]
Can you keep up?
Can you move that fast?

Can you keep up?
Can you make it last?

Are you that somebody?
Riding to the end?

Or you moving over
When the road get thin?

[Hook - Full Crew]
It's the first of the month,
Walk it out, walk it out,
All that talk from last month,
Gotta walk it out, walk it out.

It's the first of the month,
Sun up, we ain't slowing down,
Got the whole summer looking different now.

Walk it out.
Walk it out.
Walk it out.
Walk it out.

[Verse 3 - Crew Cypher]
Move over if you ain't moving forward.
Move over if you scared of the moment.

Fast enough?
Better prove it then.
Clock still ticking,
Don't lose again.

Sai trance forever,
That's family ties.
Dreams look impossible
Till they arrive.

From the borough blocks
To the digital gold,
We still got stories
That ain't been told.

No broken promises.
No fake displays.
Death before dishonor,
That's how we was raised.

Work hard.
Play harder.
Celebrate the climb.
It's the first of the month,
Now it's building time.

[Final Hook - Massive Crowd]
It's the first of the month!
Walk it out, walk it out!

It's the first of the month!
Walk it out, walk it out!

Turn the void into gold!
Walk it out, walk it out!

Whole summer looking different now!

First of the month!
First of the month!
First of the month!

[Outro]
New page.
New mission.
Same dream.

Now go earn it.

pages.vocalStyle: Fast-flowing multi-rapper delivery with tight group choruses

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Guides the rapid-fire melodic harmony forward.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: The echo that turns a chorus into a crowd.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Texture in the pocket, always moving.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: The low end you feel in your chest.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints the sky behind the words.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Everything you feel but can't name.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Chords that hold the room together.
